The '''Aquilaean system''', or '''Aquilaean systems''', was a [[Star system|star system]] that contained the [[Planet|planet]] of [[Aquilae (The Star Wars)|Aquilae]]. It was targeted by the [[New Galactic Empire]], as one of the last [[Independent Systems]], for annexation. [[Crispin Hoedaack]] was appointed its [[Governor]] by [[Emperor (The Star Wars)|Emperor]] [[Cos Dashit]]. The planet [[Yavin 4|Yavin]] was apparently part of this system, though it was also placed in the [[Forbidden Systems]]. An [[asteroid field]] separated Aquilae from Yavin.

==Behind the scenes==
In the [[The Star Wars rough draft|rough draft]] of the script for [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''A New Hope'']], the astrography of the Aquilaean system(s) is somewhat confused. The destruction of the Imperial [[Space Fortress]] is visible from Yavin.
